---
title: "P.3 Heterogeneous linear elasticity in a two-material 3D block"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---

![](images/P3_banner.png){fig-align="center"}

## **Problem Setup**

<img src="https://github.githubassets.com/images/modules/logos_page/GitHub-Mark.png" alt="GitHub logo" width="32" height="32" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:8px;"/>[Link](https://github.com/suparnob100/scikit-rom/tree/main/examples/computational_mechanics/static/linear/problem_1)

[See detailed tutorial for this problem](P3_tutorial.qmd)

![](examples_docs/P3.pdf){width="85%" height="1000px"}
